embeds.description:
**Map Name**: `arena`
**Map Size**: `42x26`
**1v1 Start Coords**: `S13` & `Y13`
Recommended for use as the main Colosseum.
Large elliptical arena, with a large variety of additional options to spice up your duels. (Optional rules for the variants is still being considered, and suggestions may be posted in <#694306844079947838>).

fields.name: Variants
fields.value:
`arena_night` ([link](https://i.imgur.com/yuUdsc0.png)) - A night time version 
`arena_glow` ([link](https://i.imgur.com/O9bCc5C.png)) - A dark version with blue glow
`arena_platform`  ([link](https://i.imgur.com/XIGUbVg.png)) - A platform surrounded by pillars
`arena_columns` ([link](https://i.imgur.com/Pyo0YOv.png)) - Rows of columns for cover
`arena_arcane` ([link](https://i.imgur.com/wJJnoQp.png)) - Glowing arcane sigils and wards
`arena_hill` ([link](https://i.imgur.com/Td1GCkM.png)) - A King of the Hill variant
`arena_air` ([link](https://i.imgur.com/PWyf7lp.png)) - Wind swirls in the center
`arena_earth` ([link](https://i.imgur.com/kOD42l7.png)) - Stone rubble provides obstacles and cover
`arena_fire` ([link](https://i.imgur.com/tkX6VMO.png)) - Narrow corridors surrounded by flame
`arena_water` ([link](https://i.imgur.com/EoJEwPp.png)) - Narrow walkways over water
